\tzpentry{ID3399}{Link Holonomy Lagrangian Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3399 introduces Link Holonomy Lagrangian Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$ \mathcal{L}_{link} = \frac{1}{4\pi}\oint_{C_1}\oint_{C_2} \frac{d\mathbf{r}_1 \times d\mathbf{r}_2 \cdot (\mathbf{r}_1 - \mathbf{r}_2)}{|\mathbf{r}_1 - \mathbf{r}_2|^3} $$
